本项目现已正式开源，目前进入随缘维护阶段。
开源并非零成本——由于个人同时维护的开源项目较多，高额的 Token 开销已难以持续承担，本项目后续将不再进行频繁的主动维护。
如有改进需求，欢迎根据实际情况自行 Fork 并修改，也非常欢迎提交 PR 共同完善本项目。感谢每一位关注和使用者的理解与支持。

This project is now officially open sourced and has entered a best-effort maintenance phase.
Open source is not free — I maintain several open-source projects at the same time, and the high token cost has become difficult to sustain. As a result, this project will no longer receive frequent proactive maintenance.
If you have improvement needs, feel free to fork and modify it based on your own situation, and PRs are very welcome to help improve this project together. Thank you for your understanding and support.
